note: Curated catalog of generally-applicable, language-agnostic standards. Adding coverage = appending a principle here (DATA, no code edit). source_content_hash is the upstream hash when the principle was last reviewed; universal-coverage-sync re-promotes only when a source hash diverges (S-21/S-5 gated).

principles.name: no-hardcoded-secrets
principles.description: No credential, key, or token literal may be committed to source in any language; load secrets from the environment or a secret store.

principles.name: no-debug-output-in-source
principles.description: No raw debug print/console output in production source in any language; use a structured logger.
